title: Sign up for a 5K, fun run, or fitness event and commit to the date
flavour: you signed up. you're going. this is not a simulation.

title: Do a full-day digital detox — no screens from morning to evening
flavour: the feed will survive without you. will you survive without the feed?

title: Go for a hike — 10km+ or something that challenges you
flavour: somewhere out there is a trail that doesn't care about your comfort zone.

title: Try a physical class you've never done — martial arts, climbing, yoga, boxing
flavour: beginner status is temporary. showing up is the hard part. you're already late.

title: Spend a full day eating only whole, unprocessed food
flavour: your body is hardware. today you're running the premium config.

title: Wake up before 6am and do something active before 7am
flavour: your sleep schedule is a crime. today you fix it by force.

title: Do a two-hour workout — full effort, not a stroll
flavour: you've been half-committing. today is not a half day.

title: Spend a day with no caffeine
flavour: the caffeine dependency is real. one day without it reveals the scale of the problem.

title: Swim a continuous 1km (or take a first-ever swimming lesson)
flavour: water mode. you're not built for it. try anyway.

title: Complete a 24-hour no-junk-food, no-alcohol, no-scroll day — all three
flavour: triple constraint mode. one day. the reset you keep telling yourself you'll do.
